mapper.select: SELECT * FROM metrics_daily WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 30
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO metrics_daily ( user_id, date, rag_tokens_input, rag_tokens_output, ppt_tokens_input, ppt_tokens_output, rag_doc_count, rag_slice_count, ppt_count ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{date}, #{ragTokensInput}, #{ragTokensOutput}, #{pptTokensInput}, #{pptTokensOutput}, #{ragDocCount}, #{ragSliceCount}, #{pptCount} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE rag_tokens_input = VALUES(rag_tokens_input), rag_tokens_output = VALUES(rag_tokens_output), ppt_tokens_input = VALUES(ppt_tokens_input), ppt_tokens_output = VALUES(ppt_tokens_output), rag_doc_count = VALUES(rag_doc_count), rag_slice_count = VALUES(rag_slice_count), ppt_count = VALUES(ppt_count)
